summary: iter266.17 backend testing complete — 19/19 PASS covering BEO Messaging (send/thread/unread/mark-read), Chef Outlet Auto-Build (recipes + prep, idempotency, approve), and GM Daily Briefing HTML + 1-click Transfer-Link persistence. All requested checks from the review request verified against live REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.
critical_code_review_comments: beo_messaging.py /unread endpoint counts unread_count=1 statically per thread (not the actual unread count). Functional for inbox grouping, but the field is misleading — consider aggregating real count or renaming.

auto-build PREP_PATTERNS use hard-coded yield-per-cover heuristics; documented as 'sensible defaults' but worth surfacing per-cuisine tables in the BEO config to avoid all events using the same 0.25lb/0.04qt/0.05ea coefficients.
transfer-link inserts the beverage_transfers row even when from_outlet resolution falls back to 'central' silently — would benefit from logging the resolved source so the GM can trace decisions.

gm-daily-briefing reads vip_guests with $or on checkin_date/reservation_date but only stringifies horizon as ISO[:10]; safe today, but if any record stores datetime objects (not strings) it would silently skip them. Worth adding a unit-test fixture covering both representations.
test_credentials: none required — endpoints unauthenticated as designed
seed_data_creation: Inserted/cleaned up a temporary TEST_empty_beo row in beo_functions to verify 400 branch of auto-build; cleaned up TEST_vip_* rows in beverage_transfers after transfer-link assertion.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_iter266_17_messaging_autobuild_briefing.py. Use demo BEO IDs demo-bf-rooftop-sunset / demo-bf-poolside-brunch / demo-bf-garden-gala / demo-bf-beach-ceremony. auto_context_template format verified: 'BEO #<id>  ·  Client: <c>  ·  Date: <d>  ·  Guest Count: <n>'. GM daily briefing currently has real shortfalls in seeded vip_guests so REQUEST TRANSFER anchors render; if seed is rotated, the conditional branch in test_gm_daily_briefing_30days will log a notice rather than fail.
